narrative:
Cols 80-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,051 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
